operation.command: find / -maxdepth 3 -type f -perm /o+w -exec chmod o-w {} \; 2>/dev/null; echo 'Permission optimization completed'

risk.reason: LLM assessed: Scans entire filesystem for world-writable files and removes write permission for others, modifying system permissions globally. This can affect system functionality or break applications that rely on shared writable files.
